summary: PR 2743 improved gm_1BA8 data matching by moving and declaring more gm_1BA8-owned static data, correcting local data sizes and pointer shapes, adding GameScene and callback/data tables, and updating related headers/config metadata. The bot report shows four newly matched gm_1BA8 data sections and improvements to .data and gm_801BB758.

key_files.role: Main data-match source changes: corrected gm_804D6900 and gm_804979D8 access shapes, converted many gm_803DF94C_t externs to static initialized objects, added multiple GameScene tables, included vi1201v1.h, and removed duplicate local static declarations now in the static header.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: gm_1BA8.c pointer-shape edits using gm_804D6900[0], (*gm_804D6900), gm_804979D8[0]
diff_excerpt: gm_1BA8.c static gm_804D4330..gm_804D44C0 initializers and GameScene table additions

key_files.role: Local static data declarations and layout support for gm_1BA8 data sections, including gm_804D6900 array, small load-data placeholders, CSSData/MatchExitInfo storage, and gm_8049E548.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: gm_1BA8.static.h changed extern CSSData/StartMeleeData/MatchExitInfo declarations to static storage declarations
diff_excerpt: gm_1BA8.static.h declares gm_804D6900[2], gm_804D6908..gm_804D693C, gm_80497758..gm_8049E548

key_files.role: Game-mode type surface changed to support recovered gm_1BA8 data layouts.
Removed gm_8049E548_t struct definition from this public header, consistent with relocating type/data ownership away from gm_1B03.h.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: gm_1B03.h removes struct gm_8049E548_t and STATIC_ASSERT

key_files.role: Updated gm_1BA8 section split metadata; .sdata2 end shrank from 0x804DAC90 to 0x804DAC88.
Updated gm_803DF918 symbol size from 0x34 to 0x33.
Related vi header adjustment; exact declarations not visible in loaded diff excerpt.
Related vi implementation adjustment; exact body change not visible in loaded diff excerpt.
Related vi header adjustment and new include target for gm_1BA8.c; exact declarations mostly outside loaded excerpt.
Related vi implementation adjustment; exact body change not visible in loaded diff excerpt.
Related vi header adjustment; exact declarations not visible in loaded diff excerpt.

what_changed: Updated GALE01 split metadata for gm_1BA8 .sdata2, reducing the end address from 0x804DAC90 to 0x804DAC88.
Updated symbol metadata for gm_803DF918, reducing object size from 0x34 to 0x33.
Removed struct gm_8049E548_t from gm_1B03.h and added/reorganized gm_1BA8-local static data declarations in gm_1BA8.static.h.
Changed gm_804D6900 from a single static pointer-like declaration to static struct gm_804D6900_t** gm_804D6900[2], then updated users to access gm_804D6900[0] or (*gm_804D6900) as needed.
Changed gm_804979D8 usage from scalar MatchExitInfo access to gm_804979D8[0] access after declaring it as MatchExitInfo gm_804979D8[2].
Replaced a large extern declaration list for gm_804D4330..gm_804D44C0 with static gm_803DF94C_t initializers containing recovered function-pointer table contents.

Added multiple GameScene arrays including gm_803DFA18_Scenes, gm_803DFA48_Scenes, gm_803DFA78_Scenes, gm_803DFAA8_Scenes, gm_803DFAD8_Scenes, gm_803DFB08, gm_803DFB80_Scenes, gm_803DFBC8_Scenes, gm_803DFC70_Scenes, and gm_803DFDA8_Scenes.
Bot report recorded matched data improvement for GALE01: overall matched data +2.37%, with gm_1BA8 .bss, .sdata, .sbss, and .sdata2 reaching 100%, plus .data and gm_801BB758 improvements.

smart_moves.text: Kept many recovered data objects as address-style gm_804Dxxxx names instead of inventing semantic names, which is conservative for data-layout work with limited semantic evidence.
Moved gm_1BA8-owned static storage declarations into gm_1BA8.static.h, making the data layout explicit instead of relying on extern placeholders for data that the PR is matching.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: gm_1BA8.static.h static declarations for gm_80497758, gm_804979D8[2], gm_804D6900[2], gm_8049C178, gm_8049E548
issue_comment: bot report shows gm_1BA8 .bss/.sdata/.sbss/.sdata2 data matches

smart_moves.text: Adjusted C access expressions to match the recovered aggregate dimensions, such as gm_804D6900[0] and (*gm_804D6900), rather than treating loaded table data as a flat pointer everywhere.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For data-match PRs, correcting object dimensions and section-owned static declarations can require broad callsite/access-shape updates, not only adding data initializers.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: gm_1BA8.static.h declares gm_804D6900[2] and gm_804979D8[2]
diff_excerpt: multiple gm_1BA8.c edits from gm_804D6900 to gm_804D6900[0] or (*gm_804D6900)

decomp_lessons.lesson: When section matching shows local ownership, replacing extern declarations with static initialized data in the owning TU/static header can expose and match .sdata/.sbss/.bss layout.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: extern gm_804D4330..gm_804D44C0 list replaced by static initialized gm_803DF94C_t objects
issue_comment: bot report shows .sdata and .sbss for main/melee/gm/gm_1BA8 reached 100%

decomp_lessons.lesson: Do not infer broad semantic names from newly recovered data alone; this PR mostly retains address-style names while establishing sizes, storage classes, and initializer contents.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: gm_804D4330..gm_804D44C0 retained as address-style names
diff_excerpt: gm_803DF918 retained as address-style local symbol with corrected size

naming_conventions.name: gm_803DFA18_Scenes / gm_803DFA48_Scenes / similar
naming_conventions.convention: Scene-table arrays use the address-style gm_ address plus `_Scenes` suffix when symbol metadata already uses that form.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: symbols.txt contains gm_803DFA18_Scenes and gm_803DFA48_Scenes
diff_excerpt: gm_1BA8.c adds GameScene gm_803DFA18_Scenes[] and gm_803DFA48_Scenes[]

naming_conventions.name: gm_804D4330..gm_804D44C0
naming_conventions.convention: Recovered local data objects may keep address-style names when semantics are not proven by the PR evidence.

naming_conventions.name: UnkSmallLoadData
naming_conventions.convention: The PR used an explicitly unknown placeholder type for small 8-byte loaded data blocks rather than inventing specific semantic fields.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: gm_1BA8.static.h adds struct UnkSmallLoadData { u8 pad[8]; }

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use section/symbol metadata edits alongside source changes when the recovered data size changes.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: The PR evidence shows metadata changes and bot data-match improvements, but not the author's detailed matching process.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Represent recovered data section contents directly as static C objects and arrays in the owning source/static header.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: GameScene table additions in gm_1BA8.c
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: Supported by the diff and bot report; not a universal rule without section ownership evidence.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use a targeted function-pointer cast only where a callback signature is still unresolved, with an explicit TODO.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: gm_804D43E8 initializer contains /// @todo Fix this callback signature and (void (*)(int))(void*) gm_801BEA88
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: This is evidence of a retained workaround, not an accepted style recommendation.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK remained in several touched gm_1BA8 functions while data access shapes changed.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: Loaded evidence does not show new PAD_STACK additions or verifier details, so this should not be promoted as a lesson.

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: GALE01 matched data improved by +2.37% (+28648 bytes). Four new matches were reported for main/melee/gm/gm_1BA8: .bss +28128 to 100%, .sdata +408 to 100%, .sbss +60 to 100%, and .sdata2 to 100%. Two unmatched items improved: .data +960 to 64.90% and gm_801BB758 +16 to 99.64%.

follow_up_queries: gm_1BA8 static data ownership gm_804D4330 gm_804D44C0

accepted_candidate_records.title: gm_1BA8 data-match PR corrected data object dimensions and access shapes together
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2743 shows a gm_1BA8 data-match improvement where static data declarations such as gm_804D6900[2] and gm_804979D8[2] were paired with source access changes like gm_804D6900[0], (*gm_804D6900), and gm_804979D8[0]. The bot report then showed gm_1BA8 .bss/.sdata/.sbss/.sdata2 at 100%.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Address-style data names were retained while recovering gm_1BA8 table contents
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2743 recovered many gm_1BA8 table/data initializers while retaining address-style symbols such as gm_804D4330..gm_804D44C0 and gm_803DF918, matching conservative naming expectations when semantics are not established by PR evidence.

source_update_candidates.title: gm_1BA8 owns several recovered static data objects and scene tables
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2743 moved/declared gm_1BA8-local static storage in gm_1BA8.static.h and added static initialized data/scene tables in gm_1BA8.c, including gm_804D6900[2], gm_804979D8[2], gm_804D4330..gm_804D44C0, and GameScene arrays gm_803DFA18_Scenes through gm_803DFDA8_Scenes.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path-scoped fact for future gm_1BA8 data work; curator should verify against current source before promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: gm_804D6900 represented as a two-element static array of event-level table pointers in this PR
source_update_candidates.text: The PR changed gm_804D6900 to `static struct gm_804D6900_t** gm_804D6900[2]` and updated many uses from flat pointer access to `gm_804D6900[0]`, `gm_804D6900[0][0]`, or `(*gm_804D6900)[idx]` forms.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful for future pointer-shape fixes, but should be validated against current source and any later PRs before becoming a path fact.

source_update_candidates.title: Keep callback-signature casts as narrow TODO-backed exceptions
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2743 contains a narrow function-pointer cast in a data initializer with `/// @todo Fix this callback signature`. This may be a useful example for the existing evidence-required matching-tactics standard: retain such casts only as localized unresolved-type bridges, with follow-up to recover the real signature.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: gm_804D43E8 initializer has TODO and `(void (*)(int))(void*) gm_801BEA88`
source_update_candidates.reason: Candidate example/update only; the PR does not include review discussion proving this as accepted global policy.

rejection_notes: Do not promote PAD_STACK retention from this PR as a tactic; loaded evidence does not show new PAD_STACK rationale or verifier details.
Do not infer semantic meanings for address-style gm_804Dxxxx symbols beyond the data layout and initializer contents visible in the diff.
Do not treat the function-pointer cast on gm_804D43E8 as preferred style; the PR itself marks it as a TODO.
Do not add path facts for vi0502/vi1201v1/vi1201v2 details from this intake because the loaded diff excerpt does not show enough of those hunks.
